name: Broodmother
description: I've promised you to my children.

25.left: +7% Spin Web Move Speed Unlocks Max Move Speed

abilities.name: Spider's Milk
abilities.description: The applied lifesteal-based heal is less effective from deny sources. Only denies from Broodmother may proc the heal component. The higher Broodmother's level, the greater the enemy max health as heal value. Radius: 600. Enemy Max Health as Heal per Instance: 1.9%. Duration: 3. Creep Lifesteal Factor: 0.6. Deny Factor: 0.5. Enemy Max Health as Heal Increase: 0.1%.

abilities.name: Insatiable Hunger
abilities.description: Grants a flat base attack damage increment per second. Aura Radius: 800. Base Attack Damage Factor: 1.4/1.5/1.6/1.7. Lifesteal: 40%/60%/80%/100% (60%/80%/100%/120%). Duration: 8/10/12/14. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Base Attack Time Reduction: (0.15). Cooldown: 45/40/35/30. Mana Cost: 80.

abilities.name: Spin Web
abilities.description: Spins a large web that grants Arachnia a bonus movement speed and bonus health regeneration within its radius. These webs do not expire until the max amount of webs are reached, destroying the oldest spun web. Cast Range: 1200. Web Radius: 1200. Turn Rate Bonus: 0.2. Move Speed Bonus: 10%/22%/34%/46% (17%/29%/41%/53%). Aura Linger Duration: 0.2. Mana Cost: 40.

abilities.name: Incapacitating Bite
abilities.description: Applies a movement speed slow and blind debuff per successful attack. The debuff-affected units have a chance to miss their attacks. Paralytic toxins come from Black Arachnia's fangs, causing a slow and painful death to those who intrude on her webs. Move Speed Slow: 20%/30%/40%/50% (40%/50%/60%/70%). Miss Chance: 15%/20%/25%/30% (35%/40%/45%/50%). Debuff Duration: 2. Attack Damage Bonus: 3/6/9/12 (8/11/14/17).

abilities.name: Spinner's Snare
abilities.description: Creates invisible web-snares next to any current webs that acts as a trap. The snares have an activation delay. Enemy heroes crossing the web will spring the trap — rooting, exposing them in the Fog of War while dealing damage over time. Cast Range: 600. Line Length: 900. Line Width: 50. Damage per Second: 100. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Debuff Duration: 3. Cooldown: 0. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Spawn Spiderlings
abilities.description: Broodmother injects her young into an enemy unit and dealing damage. Upon the affected unit's death, her babies mature, hatching young Spiderlings to aid her in the battlefield. Multiple debuff instances on the affected enemy unit work independently of each other. The ability no longer applies its ability effect on the affected enemy upon exceeding the max debuff stack. Cast Range: 900. Damage: 220/320/420 (300/400/500). Move Speed Slow: 25%/35%/45%. Number of Spiderlings per Stack: 4/5/6. Spiderling Duration: 40. Debuff Duration: 20. Cooldown: 9/8/7. Mana Cost: 100.
